control_text: Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select towers and positions | Space: Place/Upgrade tower | Z: Cancel selection | Shift: Speed up (hold) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart
description_text: Defend your command center from alien invaders in this tower defense survival game. Deploy and upgrade towers along a fixed path to destroy enemies and survive waves.

control_text: Controls: ARROWS to Move • SPACE to Jump (x2) • Z to Attack (ARROWS + Z for Directional: Up, Down, Forward, Back) • SHIFT to Dash Tips: Hit an enemy to enable Dash-Cancel!
description_text: A fast-paced stick figure platform fighter. Master combos and dash-cancels to defeat opponents by health depletion or ring-out.

control_text: Arrow Keys/WASD: Move | Space: Shoot | E: Interact | H: Heal (100 gold) | S: Shop | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Navigate 9 levels to reach the exit. Defeat all enemies to unlock the exit and buy weapons from the shop.

control_text: Arrows: Move | Space: Jump | Z: Attack | Shift: Special | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Embody the Fire Lion in this platform fighter. Battle endless shadow minions, knocking them off stage with elemental attacks and specials to survive the Abyss.

control_text: Arrow Keys: HOLD to move player continuously | Shift (Tap): Toggle sprint mode for faster movement | Space: Interact with doors, items, hiding spots | Z: Toggle flashlight (in dark levels) | Enter: Start game from title screen | Escape: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (returns to title screen)
description_text: Escape the haunted mansion while evading the terrifying. Navigate 6 challenging levels, find keys, solve puzzles, and stay hidden to survive. Complete all levels to win!

control_text: Arrow Left/Right: Navigate between tubes | Space: Select tube to pour from, then select destination to pour into | Z: Undo last move | ESC: Pause/Resume game | Enter: Start game (from start screen) | R: Restart (returns to start screen from game over)
description_text: Sort colored liquids into tubes until each tube holds a single color. Pour from a source tube to a compatible destination, matching colors or using empty tubes. Complete all levels strategically to win!

control_text: Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character | Space: Confirm upgrade selection | Shift/ESC: Pause/Unpause game | Enter: Start game from main menu | R: Restart and return to main menu
description_text: A top-down survival auto-battler. Battle endless monster waves, focusing on movement and strategic upgrades. Collect EXP to level up and defeat bosses across challenging levels.

control_text: Arrow Keys: HOLD to move/aim continuously (UP/DOWN to move, LEFT/RIGHT to aim) | Space: TAP to shoot weapon | Shift (hold): Sprint mode (faster movement) | Z: TAP to reload weapon | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
description_text: Eliminate enemies, earn XP for upgrades, and survive waves to reach level 5 and win the match in this arena FPS.

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move your soldier in four directions Z: Fire weapon SPACE: Sprint (faster movement with reduced accuracy) SHIFT: Take cover/crouch (reduced movement speed but improved accuracy) ENTER: Start game from title screen ESC: Pause/unpause game R: Restart game after victory or defeat
description_text: A tactical shooter. Eliminate enemies, manage resources, and complete missions by reaching extraction or clearing the zone.

control_text: Left Arrow / A: Move Left Lane | Right Arrow / D: Move Right Lane | Up Arrow / W: Jump | Down Arrow / S: Roll / Slide | Space: Attack / Slash | ENTER: Start Game | ESC: Pause / Resume | R: Restart (Game Over screen)
description_text: Save Brim! Run, jump, and attack through endless lanes, dodging obstacles and slaying Goons. Collect coins to survive and achieve the highest score.

control_text: Arrow Left/Right: Move the selected block horizontally Arrow Up/Down: Move the selected block vertically Z: Cycle through available blocks Space: Place the selected block on the grid Enter: Start the game from the start screen Esc: Pause/unpause the game R: Restart the game when game is over
description_text: A puzzle game: strategically place geometric blocks on a 9x9 grid. Clear full rows and columns to score points and combos. The game ends when no more blocks can be placed.

control_text: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Shoot | SHIFT: Focus | Z: Special | ENTER: Start
description_text: A high-speed vertical shoot-em-up. Pilot Mae's avatar to breach the Blue Revolver mainframe, survive security, and destroy core systems.

control_text: Arrow Left: Rotate shooter left Arrow Right: Rotate shooter right Space: Fire bubble Z: Swap current bubble with next bubble Enter: Start game (from start screen) Esc: Pause/Unpause game R: Restart (return to start screen)
description_text: Clear bubbles by matching 3+ of the same color. Aim your shooter, pop bubbles, and clear the board across 3 levels to win!

control_text: Controls: Arrow Keys (←→): Select object (when not grabbed) Space: Pick up/drop object (toggle grab mode) Arrow Keys (↑↓←→): Move grabbed object position A/D: Rotate grabbed object Enter: Start game from menu Esc: Pause/unpause game R: Restart from game over screen Z: Fire cannon (when in playing phase and not editing)
description_text: Position ramps and deflectors to guide cannon balls into buckets. Use limited balls to fill all buckets and win each level!

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move | Space: Lunge Attack | Shift: Tentacles (Large) | Z: Blood Trail (Medium+) | Enter: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: You are an amorphous creature, trapped in a facility. Consume humans to grow, evolve abilities, and eliminate all personnel to escape.

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb up/down on walls | Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump) | Z: Air dash in the direction you're moving (limited uses, recharges on landing) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
description_text: Jump, dash, and wall climb through challenging platforming levels, avoiding spikes and collecting strawberries to reach the summit.

control_text: Arrow Left: Move left | Arrow Right: Move right | Arrow Up: Jump (when on ground) | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen
description_text: Collect all cheese to activate the mouse hole and escape each level. Avoid patrolling cats. Complete all levels for victory.

control_text: SPACE: Jump | ARROWS: Move | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Guide your bouncing orb through rotating puzzles. Match its color to pass obstacles; touching a different color is fatal. Collect stars and Color Changers as you climb.

control_text: Controls: Arrow Keys to Move/Speed • ENTER to Start • ESC to Pause
description_text: Roll your ball on an endless road. Match its color with other balls to collect points, but avoid different colors to prevent crashing. Use ramps to change color and jump.

control_text: TAP-BASED CONTROLS: Arrow Keys: Single tap moves cursor one cell | Space: Tap once to start path, move with arrows to build, tap again to execute | Shift: Cancel current path | Enter: Start game | Escape: Pause/unpause | R: Return to main menu
description_text: Connect adjacent dots of the same color to clear them. Form squares to clear all dots of that color. Complete objectives before moves run out.

control_text: Controls: SPACE: Click cookie | Arrow UP/DOWN: Navigate menu | Z: Purchase | SHIFT: Toggle tabs | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Click the cookie to earn cookies, then buy buildings and upgrades to automate production. Reach 10,000 cookies to win!

control_text: ARROWS: Move/Attack | SPACE: Skip Beat | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: A rhythmic dungeon crawler. As a knight, synchronize moves and attacks to the beat to escape, defeat foes, and collect treasures. Miss a beat, stumble, and lose your combo!

control_text: Controls: Arrow Keys (←→): Move between lanes | Space: Hit Red/Green notes | Z: Hit Yellow notes | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Hit falling musical notes with precise timing to grow a mystical tree. Master tap, hold, and swipe notes, build combos, and unlock new songs.

control_text: Controls: Arrows to Move, Space to Shoot, ESC to Pause, R to Restart.
description_text: Jump through evolving worlds in this vertical platformer. Bounce off platforms, avoid monsters, and collect stars to ascend higher.

control_text: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Jump/Shoot | ENTER: Start | R: Restart
description_text: Descend a monster-filled well using Gunboots to shoot enemies, slow your fall, and collect gems. Ammo recharges on platforms. Reach the bottom alive!

control_text: Game Play Mode Drive your kei truck to pick up and deliver packages in the foggy town of Oakhaven. Earn money, navigate the roads, and watch for strange occurrences in the mist. ARROWS: Drive | WASD: Camera | SPACE: Interact
description_text: Drive your kei truck to pick up and deliver packages in the foggy town of Oakhaven. Earn money, navigate the roads, and watch for strange occurrences in the mist.

control_text: ARROWS: Move | Z: Attack | SPACE: Jump | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause
description_text: Slay endless waves of monsters in this fast-paced action RPG. Choose your hero, level up, and survive as long as you can!

control_text: Space / Arrow Up / Z / W / Click: Flap (Jump up) | Enter: Start Game | R: Restart Game | ESC: Pause / Resume
description_text: Flap a winged basketball through hoops to score. Tap to gain altitude. Avoid the ground!

control_text: ENTER: Start the game from the start screen SPACE: Launch the bird (aiming starts automatically) Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT): Adjust slingshot aim while aiming Z: Activate the current bird's special ability while in flight ESC: Pause or unpause the game R: Restart and return to the start screen

control_text: Controls: TAP ← → or A/D to move | TAP ↓ or S to drop | TAP SPACE for quick drop | ESC to pause
description_text: Drop and merge identical fruits to create bigger ones and reach the ultimate watermelon. Keep fruits below the danger line to maximize your score!

control_text: Arrow Left/Right to Rotate | ENTER to Start | ESC to Pause

control_text: TAP-BASED Controls (VLM Compatible): All controls use single key taps, no holding required. Arrow Left/Right: Select Hero or Target | Arrow Up/Down: Select Ability | Space: Confirm | Z: Cancel | Shift: End Turn | Enter: Start | Escape: Pause | R: Restart

control_text: Space to Jump | Arrows/WASD to Move | R to Restart
description_text: Control a bouncy jelly cube, jumping higher to escape the rising liquid. Time your jumps to land on closing platforms and collect blobs for score.

control_text: SPACE or ARROW UP: Activate Jetpack (Fly Up) / Flap Wings (Dragon Mode) | ESC: Pause / Unpause Game | ENTER: Start Game | R: Restart Game (on Game Over screen) | Z: Activate special vehicle ability (if equipped)

control_text: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Charge Jump | R: Restart | ESC: Pause

control_text: Arrow Up / W: Accelerate | Arrow Down / S: Brake / Reverse | Arrow Left / A: Steer Left | Arrow Right / D: Steer Right | Space: Use Item / Horn | Shift: Drift (Hold while turning for tighter turns) | Enter: Start Game | Esc: Pause Game | R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

control_text: ARROWS: Move/Aim | Z: Shoot | SPACE: Jump | SHIFT: Weapon | ENTER: Start | R: Restart

control_text: Arrows: Move | Space: Jump | Z: Attack | Shift: Block | Enter: Start

description_text: Master precision! Throw knives into rotating logs, avoid existing knives and obstacles, slice apples for bonuses, and defeat bosses.

control_text: ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Jump / Double Jump | ENTER: Start | R: Restart

description_text: Race through challenging tracks in this top-down arcade racer! Avoid obstacles, master drifting, and upgrade your car to defeat the ultimate boss, The Enforcer.

description_text: A strategic tower defense game. Build monkey towers to pop waves of balloons, earn money, and upgrade defenses. Survive all waves to win!

control_text: Controls: Arrows to Move, Space to Wait, ESC to Pause, R to Restart

description_text: Tilt the world to guide the ball through 3D mazes. Reach the goal zone to advance to the next level. Be careful not to fall off the edges!

control_text: Left Arrow: Move to the Left side and Chop | Right Arrow: Move to the Right side and Chop | Enter: Start Game | R: Restart Game (from Game Over) | Esc: Pause / Unpause
description_text: Chop an endless tree, dodging branches by moving to the opposite side. Each chop earns points and restores energy; run out of energy and the game ends. Stay quick!

control_text: Controls: Space: Hit blue circular notes | Z: Hit gold star notes | Shift: Hit purple circular notes | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart
description_text: A rhythm game. Hit notes precisely as they reach the central target to score points, build combos, and maintain health. Complete songs to progress.

control_text: Move: Arrow Keys or A/D | Fire: SPACE (costs energy!) | Switch Direction: Q (left) / E (right) | Aim: UP/DOWN Arrows | Start: ENTER | Pause: ESC | Restart: R
description_text: Defend your tower from zombie waves. Move to collect blocks and shoot enemies. Use blocks to upgrade your tower and survive three challenging levels.

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move cursor on grid | Space: Grab/release vehicle under cursor | Arrow Keys (while grabbed): Slide vehicle one space | R: Restart | ESC: Pause/Unpause | Enter: Start game
description_text: Slide vehicles to clear a path for the red bus to exit the grid. Each vehicle moves along its orientation. Solve challenging parking puzzles.

control_text: WASD: Move | SPACE: Jump | SHIFT: Dive | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: A chaotic 3D obstacle course battle royale. Race as a colorful bean, navigating hazards to reach the finish line and claim your crown before qualification spots fill up!

control_text: Use Left/Right Arrows to Rotate. Space to Jump.
description_text: Control a ball rolling on a twisting path. Rotate the world to align platforms, jump gaps, and collect gems. Survive as speed increases!

control_text: W, A, S, D: Move Forward, Left, Backward, Right | Arrow Keys: Look / Aim Camera | Space: Jump | Shift: Dash (Directional) | Z: Fire Weapon | ESC: Pause / Unpause | R: Restart (when Game Over) | Enter: Start Game
description_text: A fast-paced FPS where blood is fuel. Heal by killing enemies to survive waves in procedural arenas. Master movement and build style to progress.

control_text: Controls: Arrow Keys: Move your SOUL (red heart) to dodge attacks in battle / Navigate menu options | Z Key: Confirm menu selection / Advance dialogue | Space: Quick dodge (short cooldown) | Enter: Start game from main menu | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen from game over
description_text: As a human in the monster-filled Underground, navigate encounters. Use a unique battle system to SPARE enemies through dialogue and dodging attacks, or FIGHT. Survive three encounters to escape.

control_text: Arrow Keys / WASD: Waddle (Move) | Shift (hold): Run | Space: HONK! (Startles the gardener) | Z: Grab / Drop item (Interact) | Enter: Start Game | Escape: Pause / Resume | R: Restart (Game Over screens)
description_text: Become a mischievous goose! Ruin the gardener's day by stealing items, setting pranks, and honking. Complete your tasks to win, but avoid the chasing gardener.

control_text: ARROWS: Move/Aim | SPACE: Jump | Z: Mine/Place/Attack | SHIFT: Cycle Items | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: A 2D survival sandbox. Explore, mine resources, build shelter, and dig deep to find the legendary Blue Core artifact.

control_text: Use WASD to Move, ARROWS to Look. Z to Place, SHIFT to Cycle Tool.
description_text: A 3D open-world sandbox. Explore, build, and survive in a procedurally generated world by placing blocks and mining resources.

control_text: Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character | Space: Jump | Z: Cast Line / Hook / Reel In (Hold during mini-game) | Shift: Sprint | Enter: Start Game | Esc: Pause / Resume | R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)
description_text: Relax, explore an island, and cast your line to catch unique fish. Master reeling, fill your journal, earn coins, and seek the legendary Glitch Fish!

control_text: Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally | Space: Jump | Z: Shift between Material World and Energy World | Enter: Start game from start screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart and return to start screen
description_text: Navigate a mystical creature across dimensional rifts to rescue spirits. Shift between Material and Energy Worlds to solve platforming puzzles, where each world has unique elements. Avoid hazards to succeed!

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move in 8 directions (Up, Down, Left, Right, and diagonals) | Space: Fire your weapon | Shift: Activate special ability (Dash forward) | Enter: Start game / Confirm menu selections | Esc: Pause / Unpause game | R: Restart (return to start screen)
description_text: Battle enemy waves across 5 levels in a shrinking arena. Collect upgrades, survive the timer, and defeat all foes to become the apex predator.

control_text: Controls: Arrow Keys: Steer | Space: Speed Boost | Z: Magnet | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Control a worm, eat food to grow, and eliminate opponents by making them crash. Survive to become the largest in the arena!

control_text: Space/Arrows to turn. Don't fall off.
description_text: A fast-paced isometric runner. Control a sphere, switch directions to stay on the procedurally generated wall, collect diamonds, and go as far as you can!

control_text: Controls: ↑↓ Navigate choices | SPACE Select choice | Z Quick-select | ENTER Start | ESC Pause | R Restart
description_text: Navigate post-apocalyptic Seoul in 2033. Make critical choices to manage your Health, Stress, Money, and abilities (STR, INT, CHA). Survive daily events to unlock achievements and new story branches.
